vertical: Security & compliance automation (SOC 2 / ISO / continuous monitoring) — late-stage, enterprise-scale GTM
campaign_name: HubSpot Segmentation Ceiling → Warehouse-Native MAP Adoption
objective: Land Vanta as a net-new Conversion customer while the post-Series-D stack-evaluation window is open. Three signal types stacked in the scan window: a $150M Series D (fresh budget plus a mandate to scale lifecycle), a 3-star HubSpot G2 review citing segmentation limits and a push toward Snowflake-native audiences, and a live marketing-operations job posting. Buying committee is the VP/Director of Marketing Ops plus the Head of Data. Move fast — shelf life ~6 days from the freshest signal.
lifecycle_stage: Prospect · New — active buying window, high urgency

segment.name: HubSpot-Ceiling_WarehouseNative-MAP_Vanta
salesforce_filters: Contact.Title LIKE '%Marketing Operations%' OR Contact.Title LIKE '%Head of Data%' OR Contact.Title LIKE '%Director of Marketing%' OR Contact.Title LIKE '%VP Marketing%'
warehouse_traits: g2_review_signal.vendor = 'HubSpot' AND g2_review_signal.star_rating <= 3 AND g2_review_signal.review_body ILIKE '%segmentation%' AND g2_review_signal.days_since_review <= 7
intent_topic.category = 'Marketing Automation Platform Evaluation' AND intent_topic.surge_score >= 70

hiring_signal.department = 'Marketing Operations' AND hiring_signal.required_skills ILIKE '%Salesforce%' AND hiring_signal.required_skills ILIKE '%Snowflake%' AND hiring_signal.days_since_posted <= 10
funding_event.round = 'Series D' AND funding_event.amount_usd >= 150000000 AND funding_event.days_since_announced <= 14
segment.estimated_size: 1 target account · 3–5 contacts (VP/Dir Marketing Ops, Head of Data, CMO-adjacent stakeholders)

touches.timing: Day 0 · 08:45 recipient local time · Tuesday or Wednesday send only
touches.subject: {{first_name}}, Vanta's Snowflake investment deserves a MAP that keeps up
touches.body_brief: Open by naming the specific G2 review signal: Vanta's team is already writing custom SQL to work around HubSpot's native segmentation limits — that's engineering time spent on plumbing, not pipeline. Bridge to the Series D mandate: with $150M to deploy and a scale-lifecycle charter, the cost of MAP fragility compounds fast. Introduce Conversion as the only MAP built warehouse-native — segmentation lives in Snowflake, not a proprietary data layer. Single CTA: 15-minute 'Snowflake audience live-build' demo — AE shares screen, pulls a real Vanta-shaped segment in <5 minutes with zero SQL handoff. Keep body under 180 words. No marketing footer imagery — plain-text format to maximize deliverability into ops personas.
qa_rules: BLOCK send if Contact.HasOptedOutOfEmail = true
BLOCK send if Account.Current_Trial_Vendor__c IN ('Conversion','Marketo')
VERIFY {{g2_review_snippet}} resolves to non-null string length > 20 chars before send
VERIFY {{funding_round_amount}} token renders as '$150M' — numeric format gate
VERIFY {{ae_calendar_link}} is a valid URL (regex: ^https://)
DEDUPE: suppress if Contact received any Conversion outbound email in last 14 days
SPAM-GATE: plain-text variant only — flag if HTML image tags detected in final render
SEND-WINDOW: hard block if local send time falls outside 07:00–17:00 recipient timezone
touches.success_metric: Email open rate ≥ 45% · Reply rate or CTA click ≥ 12% within 48 hours

touches.timing: Day 1 · 30 minutes after Step 1 email confirmed delivered · AE sends manual InMail via Sales Navigator
touches.subject: Snowflake-native segmentation — following up on the email
touches.body_brief: Short, human LinkedIn message from AE. Reference the email sent moments ago so the outreach feels coordinated, not spammy. Cite the HubSpot segmentation ceiling pain point by name — 'saw the note about building custom SQL audiences.' Mention the Series D timing: 'congrats on the Sequoia round — seems like exactly the moment to lock in the right stack.' Offer a single soft ask: a 10-minute async Loom walkthrough OR a live call — let them choose. Hard limit: 300 characters for InMail preview pane optimization. Do not attach assets or decks.
qa_rules: VERIFY AE has active Sales Navigator seat before routing — block task if seat_status != 'active'
VERIFY {{loom_demo_url}} resolves with HTTP 200 before message send
BLOCK if Contact.LinkedIn_Opted_Out__c = true
DEDUPE: suppress if Contact already has an open LinkedIn conversation thread with AE in last 7 days
CHARACTER-GATE: flag message body if preview-pane string (first 300 chars) ends mid-sentence
TIMING-LOCK: must fire within 90-minute window after Step 1 delivery confirmation — expire task if window missed
touches.success_metric: InMail acceptance rate ≥ 35% · Loom link click OR calendar booking within 72 hours

touches.timing: Day 2 · 09:00 AE local time · fires if no reply to Step 1 or Step 2 by EOD Day 1
touches.subject: AE Research Task: Map Vanta Buying Committee + Tailor Series D ROI Angle
touches.body_brief: Structured AE research and personalization task surfaced in Salesforce. Task body should include: (1) Confirm the live MarOps job posting is still active on Greenhouse — copy job ID and required skills into Opportunity Notes. (2) Identify if the Head of Data or VP Marketing Ops has posted on LinkedIn about Snowflake/data stack in last 30 days — note any quote for use in Step 4 email. (3) Pull Vanta's current HubSpot contract renewal date from ZoomInfo or LinkedIn — if <6 months, flag as 'renewal-pressure' account tag in Salesforce. (4) Draft a one-paragraph ROI note: at $150M raised, quantify what a 10% improvement in lifecycle conversion rate means in ARR terms using Vanta's estimated ACVs. Paste into Opportunity Notes for Step 4 personalization. Estimated task time: 20 minutes.
qa_rules: VERIFY Opportunity record exists in Salesforce with Stage != 'Closed Lost' before creating task
VERIFY {{greenhouse_job_posting_url}} is non-null — pull from hiring_signal warehouse trait
FLAG task to AE manager if not completed within 4 business hours of creation
BLOCK Step 4 from firing until Task.Status__c = 'Completed' and Opportunity.Research_Notes__c != null
DEDUPE: do not create duplicate task if an identical task was created in last 48 hours on same Opportunity
touches.success_metric: AE task completed within 4 hours · Opportunity Notes updated with ROI calc and renewal intel

touches.timing: Day 3 · 09:15 recipient local time · fires only after Step 3 task marked Complete
touches.subject: {{first_name}} — what replacing the SQL workaround actually buys back
touches.body_brief: This email is the 'proof + ROI' beat. Open with a direct callback to the AE-researched hook: cite the Greenhouse job posting by title and note that hiring for Snowflake-fluent MarOps is expensive precisely because current tools force engineers into the loop. Transition to a concrete ROI frame: with Conversion, the audience that took a Vanta data engineer 3 days to build in SQL can be built by a marketer in 8 minutes — include the AE-calculated ROI note from Step 3 Opportunity Notes. Include one customer proof point from a comparable Series D / high-growth SaaS (use token, not hardcoded name, to allow QA substitution). Close with a specific calendar slot — two options, not an open-ended Calendly link — to reduce friction. Under 200 words. Plain text, same AE signature.
qa_rules: BLOCK send if Task.Status__c != 'Completed' on linked Opportunity
VERIFY {{ae_roi_note}} token is non-null and length > 50 chars — hard block if empty
VERIFY {{comparable_customer_name}} is not 'Vanta' (no self-referential proof point)
VERIFY {{ae_calendar_slot_1}} and {{ae_calendar_slot_2}} are both future timestamps (> now)
BLOCK send if Contact.HasOptedOutOfEmail = true
DEDUPE: suppress if Contact replied to Step 1 email (reply = positive signal, route to AE directly)
SPAM-GATE: flag if word count exceeds 220 words in final render
SEND-WINDOW: hard block outside 07:00–17:00 recipient timezone
touches.success_metric: Reply rate ≥ 18% · Meeting booked rate ≥ 10% within 48 hours of send

touches.timing: Day 5 · fires if no meeting booked by EOD Day 4 · displayed on Conversion free-tier or trial touchpoints; if no product session detected, fall back to email on Day 5 at 10:00 recipient local time
touches.subject: Vanta's Snowflake audiences — live in 8 minutes. Ready when you are.
touches.body_brief: Final urgency touch. If in-app: persistent top-of-screen banner on any Conversion marketing touchpoint or content page the contact visits. Message: 'You're one SQL query away from never writing one again. See Conversion pull a Snowflake audience in 8 minutes — built for teams at Vanta's scale.' CTA button: 'Book 15 min with {{ae_first_name}}'. If email fallback: short 5-sentence plain-text. Subject: 'Last note from me, {{first_name}} — the Snowflake demo is 8 minutes'. Body references the full signal stack (Series D budget window, G2 review, MarOps hiring) as a single sentence to reinforce urgency, then one CTA. No follow-up scheduled after this touch — AE takes over manually if no response.
qa_rules: VERIFY contact has not booked a meeting (Opportunity.Meeting_Booked__c != true) before firing
VERIFY {{ae_calendar_link}} resolves with HTTP 200
CHANNEL-FALLBACK: confirm product session event in warehouse (page_view count > 0 in last 72h) before triggering in_app_banner; else route to email fallback automatically
BLOCK if Contact.HasOptedOutOfEmail = true (covers email fallback path)
DEDUPE: suppress if any positive reply or meeting booking detected across all prior steps
URGENCY-GATE: verify {{days_since_g2_review}} <= 10 — if review signal is stale, swap {{signal_stack_summary}} to leading with funding signal instead
FINAL-TOUCH FLAG: set Contact.Campaign_Sequence_Complete__c = true after this step fires regardless of engagement outcome
touches.success_metric: Banner CTR ≥ 8% OR email fallback reply/click ≥ 10% · Meeting booked from this touch ≥ 5%

optimization_triggers.condition: Contact replies to any email touch with positive intent keywords ('interested', 'yes', 'let's talk', 'send me', 'tell me more') at any step
optimization_triggers.action: Immediately pause all remaining automated touches. Route contact to AE with Slack alert including reply text, step number, and recommended next action: 'Skip to demo booking — do not send Step N+1.' Set Contact.Buying_Signal_Strength__c = 'Hot'.

optimization_triggers.condition: g2_review_signal.days_since_review exceeds 10 days at campaign runtime (signal going stale)
optimization_triggers.action: Optimization agent rotates primary urgency anchor in Steps 1 and 4 from G2 review to hiring signal. Swap {{g2_review_snippet}} lead-in for {{greenhouse_job_posting_summary}} lead-in across all pending touches. Log variant swap as 'signal-rotation-hiring' in campaign analytics.

optimization_triggers.condition: funding_event.days_since_announced exceeds 14 days before campaign completes (budget window narrowing)
optimization_triggers.action: Compress remaining touch cadence: collapse any Day 3–5 gaps to Day 2–3. Upgrade Step 5 from in_app_banner to direct AE phone task. Set campaign urgency flag to 'CRITICAL' and alert AE manager.

optimization_triggers.condition: hiring_signal.job_posting_status transitions to 'filled' or 'removed' during campaign runtime
optimization_triggers.action: Remove hiring signal token from all unsent touches. Optimization agent re-weights body_brief emphasis to G2 review pain point and Series D ROI angle. Update {{signal_stack_summary}} token to exclude hiring reference.

optimization_triggers.condition: Intent surge score for 'Marketing Automation Platform Evaluation' drops below 50 mid-campaign (buying signal cooling)
optimization_triggers.action: Pause Steps 4 and 5. Optimization agent triggers a re-segmentation check: if account intent score recovers above 60 within 5 days, resume sequence at next step. If not recovered, archive campaign and create a 30-day re-entry nurture task for AE.

optimization_triggers.condition: A new contact at Vanta matching Title LIKE '%Marketing Operations%' OR '%Head of Data%' is created in Salesforce mid-campaign
optimization_triggers.action: Optimization agent clones Step 1 touch and re-enters new contact into sequence at Step 1 with same personalization tokens. Do not re-send to contacts already in sequence. Alert AE of buying committee expansion.

optimization_triggers.condition: Account.Current_Trial_Vendor__c is updated to 'Conversion' or 'Marketo' at any point during campaign
optimization_triggers.action: Immediately suppress all remaining touches for all contacts at this account. Set Campaign_Status__c = 'Suppressed - Trial Active'. Alert AE to shift to trial-conversion playbook.

optimization_triggers.condition: Conference attendance signal detected for Vanta contact at a MarTech, SaaStr, or RevOps event within campaign window (sourced from intent data or LinkedIn event RSVPs)
optimization_triggers.action: Optimization agent inserts a conference_meet touch: AE task to request an in-person or lounge meeting at the event. Personalize outreach with event name and booth/session reference. Reprioritize this as the primary CTA over remote demo booking for the duration of the event window.

pipeline_projection.expected_renewals: N/A — net-new prospect. Expected outcome: 1 qualified meeting booked within 6-day buying window → opportunity created at $80K–$120K estimated ACV. Pipeline contribution: $100K ACV (midpoint). At 25% stage-1-to-close rate for Series D SaaS, expected closed ARR attribution: $25K. Full-sequence meeting booking rate benchmark: 15–20% for 3-signal stacked outbound.
pipeline_projection.ae_efficiency: AE active time: ~35 minutes total (20-min Step 3 research task + 10-min LinkedIn InMail + 5-min calendar slot selection). All 5 touches otherwise fully automated. AE is unblocked for parallel outbound — estimated 4–6 additional accounts can run concurrently without AE capacity conflict. Zero manual email drafting required.
pipeline_projection.campaign_runtime: 6 days end-to-end (Day 0 send → Day 5 final touch). Matches estimated shelf life of freshest signal (MarOps job posting, 6 days old at launch). All triggers and fallbacks resolved within the window. Post-Day-5: AE manual ownership only.
pipeline_projection.downside: Downside scenario: all 5 touches go unanswered, no meeting booked. Probability estimate: 65% (cold outbound base rate for VP+ personas). Outcomes: (1) Zero pipeline from this sequence — $0 ACV. (2) Vanta moves forward with a competitor MAP or extends HubSpot contract on renewal pressure. (3) If intent score drops below threshold trigger, campaign auto-archives with 30-day re-entry nurture — second-window opportunity preserved. (4) AE time cost: 35 minutes sunk with no return. Mitigation: optimization triggers for signal rotation and cadence compression reduce downside probability by an estimated 8–12 percentage points. Conference_meet trigger provides a non-digital recovery path if signal stack cools before Day 5.

meta.campaign_name: HubSpot Segmentation Ceiling → Warehouse-Native MAP Adoption
meta.vertical: Security & Compliance Automation (SOC 2 / ISO / Continuous Monitoring)

signal_stack.detail: $150M Series D led by Sequoia Capital
3-star HubSpot review citing segmentation ceiling and custom SQL audience workarounds; evaluating Snowflake-native alternatives
Live MarOps job posting requiring Salesforce + Snowflake fluency

signals.description: $150M Series D led by Sequoia. Fresh capital plus aggressive hiring means the marketing-ops team is under pressure to scale lifecycle campaigns — a budget-and-mandate window.

3-star G2 review of HubSpot: 'HubSpot works fine at our scale but we're hitting the ceiling on segmentation. Building custom SQL audiences because the native filters aren't flexible enough. Evaluating alternatives that work natively with our Snowflake data.'
Live marketing-operations job posting requiring Salesforce plus warehouse fluency — pulled from the job-board scan this morning. The one signal in this stack collected live, not seeded.

why_now.rationale: 3 signals detected in the last 10 days. Buying window closes in ~4 days.
